description: Sample framework mapping demonstrating control structure

controls.title: Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.rationale: MFA significantly reduces the risk of credential-based attacks.
controls.recommendation: Enable MFA for all users through Conditional Access policies.

controls.title: Enable Diagnostic Logging
controls.rationale: Logging enables detection, investigation, and response to security events.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings for all critical resources and send to Log Analytics.

controls.title: Implement Network Segmentation
controls.rationale: Network segmentation limits lateral movement in case of a breach.
controls.recommendation: Deploy NSGs and use VNet segmentation to isolate workloads.
